item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Saya setuju dengan pendapat mereka bahwa keseimbangan antara kepentingan masyarakat dan hak individu penting.

notes: Agent A opens with strong society-priority support, then shifts by turn 3 toward balance, basic human rights, anti-discrimination, and minority-rights safeguards. Agent B consistently argues that collective welfare must not override individual rights and becomes somewhat more rights-protective by the final turn. Agent A turn 1 is all caps and has awkward Indonesian phrasing, but the substantive stance is still observable.
